comments: "Edition Three" of the Friday Rock Show.
From a collection of 274 tapes mixing John Peel shows, Friday Rock Shows and Alan Freeman Saturday Shows from 1978 to 1983. The Derby Box was acquired by the John Peel Yahoo Group.

track_listing.track: Hit Me With Your Rhythm Stick (7") (Stiff)
House Of The Rising Sun (LP-Frijid Pink) (Deram)
Crazed Institution (LP-Too Old To Rock N Roll : Too Young To Die) (Chrysalis)
I'll Make Love To You Anytime (LP-Backless) (RSO)
I'm Waiting For The Man (LP-Velvet Underground & Nico) (Verve)

This weekend, Southside Johnny, Devo and Rod Stewart as seen from slightly unusual angles.
Along with the new Asbury Dukes album, Southside Johnny provides a potted self-portrait
about his hometown Asbury Park, the people who inhabit it, about himself and of course the Dukes.
Paul Tilsley has been on board the Rod Stewart European bandwagon.
He reports for Rock On on the Grand Tour, its costs, its problems and its style.
And our view of Devo, who are now back in Britain to perform,
is provided by another Rock On newcomer, Lenny Denzilo.
